question_pt: Quantas internacoes ocorreram por descricao do carater de internacao?
sql: SELECT c.DESCRICAO AS carater_internacao, COUNT(*) AS internacoes FROM internacoes i JOIN car_int c ON i.CAR_INT = c.CAR_INT GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY internacoes DESC
